title: Better Netherite
description: A pack that upgrades netherite to have gold parts and therefore relate to its crafting recipe better.
body:
![Pack Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/245853e6d005d2b5e2e68d45f54ff5e78166cc8c.png)
# Description
This resource pack reworks the texture of all netherite related items to be more accurate to their crafting recipies by adding gold highlights and other accents/features.

## Features (Textures reworked)
- Netherite Upgrade Smithing Template
- Netherite Block
- Netherite Sword
- Netherite Pickaxe
- Netherite Shovel
- Netherite Hoe
- Netherite Axe
- Netherite Spear
- Netherite Helmet
- Netherite Chestplate
- Netherite Leggings
- Netherite Boots
- Netherite Nautilus Armour
- Netherite Horse Armour
- Netherite Ingot
(Ancient Debris and Netherite Scrap are left unchanged due to gold being added when crafting netherite ingots)

## Showcase
![Showcase](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a08204b08119d48aa7b13c68fe250b66b2a9cc3d.png)
